title: Barely Modded
description: A modpack made to make the vanilla experience better without adding content (made for vanilla servers and lets plays !)
body:
Barely Modded is a modpack fully made to play client side while playing on vanilla servers and/or vanilla let's plays.


It's main objective is to add quality of life features as well as shader support to add onto the minecraft experience without adding "new content"


This modpack is also usable as modpack bases as long as it is credited in decriptions :)


Here are some in game screenshots to showcase the modpack :


![Barely Modded - #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8fbd2b7e5709e5e1eb31f464b1395f27557be3ba.jpeg)

![Barely Modded - #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20c3fea57950ab50940de40952f964ce697987eb.jpeg)

![Barely Modded - #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9edc678d937bf57c3f90279a0748c7e0dfcc854f.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Modpack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Error Messages, Game Not Launching, Specific mods crashing the game...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
